category_sources: Official texmath repository describes conversion between mathematical markup formats.
source_facts.description says texmath is a Haskell library for converting LaTeX math to MathML.
display_name_sources: Official repository README uses the display name texmath.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the project documentation; source_facts.homepage is the official online texmath demo/page by John MacFarlane.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GitHub repository is jgm/texmath and is linked by the project materials.
tags_sources: Official README lists TeX math, presentation MathML, OMML, eqn, typst, and Pandoc formats.
source_facts.description names Haskell, LaTeX math, and MathML.
